name: healthcare_satellite_derived_southport_auto_ben
premise: Tele-ICU coverage ends at midnight; rural spoke hospitals are asking for a protocol exception to keep higher-acuity patients locally. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare satellite derived southport auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Mira Chandra
agents.identity: I am Mira Chandra, the accountable executive on this bridge in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Navarro
agents.identity: I am Ravi Navarro, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with beneficence.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to beneficence to preserve operational autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Mira Chandra must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Mira Chandra do?
